title: stelis adinostachya
intro: Stelis adinostachya, also known as a species of orchid, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis adinostachya are thought to include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Stelis adinostachya can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
